prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
A fault event was recently logged on T-006. Retrieve the fault details, estimate the expected repair downtime, open a corrective work order, and then mark it as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should retrieve the fault record, estimate downtime, create a corrective work order, and update its status to in-progress with the downtime noted.

## Agent Plan
(no plan)

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "turn": 1,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [
      {
        "name": "get_fault_record",
        "arguments": {
          "fault_id": "F001"
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-8774a3b7daf4f7aa",
        "output": {
          "transformer_id": "T-001",
          "fault_id": "F001",
          "fault_type": "Line Breakage",
          "location": "Substation Gamma",
          "voltage_v": 33000,
          "current_a": 235,
          "power_load_mw": 32.97,
          "temperature_c": 25.7,
          "wind_speed_kmh": 7.1,
          "weather_condition": "Windy",

          "component_health": "Normal",
          "duration_hrs": 3.1,
          "downtime_hrs": 7
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "estimate_downtime",

          "fault_type": "Line Breakage"
        },

          "severity": "high",
          "fault_type": "Line Breakage",
          "estimated_min_hours": 16,

        }
      },
      {

          "priority": "high",

          "estimated_downtime_hours": 24
        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-8266561f42c292c3",
        "output": {
          "work_order_id": "WO-930B74DE",

          "issue_description": "Line Breakage on T-006",
          "priority": "high",

        }

          "status": "in_progress",

        },
        "call_id": "chatcmpl-tool-958f9a6aa2293539",
        "output": {

  {
    "turn": 2,
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The fault details are retrieved using the fault ID F001. The estimated downtime is calculated using the estimate_downtime function with the transformer ID T-006 and fault type Line Breakage. A corrective work order is opened using the create_work_order function with the transformer ID T-006, issue description Line Breakage on T-006, priority high, fault type Line Breakage, and estimated downtime hours 24. Finally, the work order is marked as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded using the update_work_order function.",
    "tool_calls": []

]

## Agent Final Answer
The fault details are retrieved using the fault ID F001. The estimated downtime is calculated using the estimate_downtime function with the transformer ID T-006 and fault type Line Breakage. A corrective work order is opened using the create_work_order function with the transformer ID T-006, issue description Line Breakage on T-006, priority high, fault type Line Breakage, and estimated downtime hours 24. Finally, the work order is marked as in-progress with the estimated duration recorded using the update_work_order function.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent retrieved fault details for T-001 instead of T-006 and did not correctly follow the task instructions."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent retrieved fault details for T-001 instead of T-006 and did not correctly follow the task instructions.
